calendar.matters:
Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Dec-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elizabeth MacDonald, 415.922.5939, for plaintiff Dodeka, LLC.
Jeremiah Turner, 415.967.8553, defendant in pro per.

RULING: MATTER DISCUSSED. AT CONCLUSION OF DISCUSSION, THE COURT GRANTS CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IN PART/DENIES CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IN PART. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE 75% ($85.86) HELD TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR AND 25% ($28.61) HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT. ORDER TO BE PREPARED BY COURT. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LAURA MARTINEZ, 415.225.2926, CSR #11332.

***AFTER HEARING, THE COURT SIGNS ORDER DETERMINING CLAIM OF EXEMPTION (GRANTED IN PART, DENIED IN PART).
